What we do

Every organization sits on data it has never read. Policies no one has time to search. Cameras no one has time to watch. The data is there. It sits unused.

Manar reads it. We train a registered model on your specific conditions, install it on hardware you own, and let it grow sharper every day it operates. The intelligence never leaves your walls.

Your data. Your walls. Your intelligence.

Train a registered model on the data your operation already produces.
Install it on hardware you own, inside your walls, offline if required.
Keep it current as your operation grows, compounding sharper with every day it runs.
The premise
Generic AI is available to everyone, which is precisely why it is the advantage of no one. The advantage is sovereign intelligence, trained on your conditions alone, running offline on hardware you control.
The approach
Built to extend. A new kind of work gets a model trained for it, not a system rebuilt from nothing. What it learns about your operation stays with you.
The company
Manar trains and deploys registered models, on hardware sized to what each one does, inside your environment. One method. Seventeen models. Built to grow.
Where it fits

Built for what you actually run. Not the world in general.

Manar maintains seventeen registered models across six families. Choose the sector you run, and see which models read its data, where they show up, and how a deployment begins on your ground.

Where it runs

It runs on what you already have. On hardware sized to the job.

A deployment does not rebuild your site around it. The model plugs into the systems you already run, on hardware sized to the job, and works with what they already produce.

CONNECT

What you already run

The cameras, machines, records, and software already running at a site. A registered model works with the systems operating today. It does not replace them.

Cameras · Machines · Records · Software
READ

Live data in place

The model reads data where it already lives. No export, no transfer to a third party, no rebuild of the operation around our software.

No export · No transfer · No third-party access
REASON

Local intelligence

Reasoning happens on site, on hardware sized to the model deployed there, owned by the client or specified by Manar. Decisions, alerts, and answers delivered where the work happens.

On-site hardware · Client-owned · Sized to workload
REMAIN

Sovereign throughout

None of this requires data to leave the building. Integration extends what a model can read. It does not change where the intelligence runs or who owns it.

Data stays inside · Sovereign from day one
How we reach further

Three ways in. Your data never moves.

A partner often already has the infrastructure, the install base, or the software a client uses every day. Manar trains the model behind it. However a deployment starts, the client's data stays in their building.

Direct

We install it ourselves

Manar trains the model, ships it, and installs it inside the client's environment. We hold the relationship from the first conversation to ongoing support.

Example · A school or government office we approach directly, with no existing vendor already in the room.
Through an installer

They already hold the relationship

A systems integrator or distributor already sells and maintains the hardware a client runs. Manar trains the model for that hardware. They keep the client and the install. We keep the model.

Example · A CCTV or security integrator on a factory floor, now selling Simah as the intelligence layer on cameras they already maintain.
Inside their product

They already hold the software

A partner's existing software calls the model as a feature inside their own product. Their customers see the partner's interface, not ours. We supply and train the model behind it.

Example · A school or hospital records platform a client already runs, adding document search or imaging support as a feature inside it.
How we work

From the registry. Onto your ground.

A deployment starts with one of the registered models. It gets trained on your data, installed on your hardware, and kept current as your operation changes.

1 Train

Start from a registered model already built for the classification a client needs. Train it further on their own data until it knows their specific conditions.

A security model retrained on a site’s own camera footage.
2 Deploy

The trained model installs on hardware the organization owns. In its building, behind its walls, offline if required. No cloud dependency. No data leaves.

A school’s A knowledge model on a server inside their own office.
3 Adapt

The model retrains as the client’s own data grows, so it reflects the operation as it is today, not as it was on day one.

A factory’s A quality-control model updated as new defect patterns appear.
4 Compound

Accuracy on a client’s own conditions grows with every day the model runs there. The organization that started earlier holds a record no later competitor can shortcut.

Two years of scans inside A diagnostics model, a record no vendor can replicate.

Your data. Your walls. Your intelligence.

AI is not arriving. It is here. The question every organization now faces is not whether to use it, but whether the intelligence it uses knows their world or someone else's. Intelligence that runs in your building, on your data, trained for your domain, sovereign from the first inference, is a different category of capability. That is what Manar builds.

What we believe

Four convictions.

The principles behind every model we train and every deployment we run.

Conviction

Intelligence that knows your world is not the same product as intelligence that knows the world.

Generic AI trains on everyone’s data and optimises for the average. Your fields, machines, and conditions are not the average. The gap is the entire product.

Specific beats general. Always.
Conviction

The window to build your own intelligence is open now. It will not stay open.

Every month you train on your data, the system grows sharper. Every month a competitor waits, the gap widens. There is no shortcut to a record two years in the making.

Starting is the advantage. Waiting is the cost.
Conviction

The moat is not the model. It is the proprietary data the model learned from.

Models are open. Software is copied. A proprietary record of your environment, gathered through years of sovereign operation, cannot be reproduced at any speed or budget.

The data never leaves. The intelligence never stops learning.
Conviction

Running in your building is not a compromise. It is the point.

Intelligence on your hardware, on your data, in your environment. That is not a lesser version of the cloud. It is the sovereign version.

Your roof. Your architecture. Your advantage.
The tuning atelier
HIKMAحكمة

The House of Wisdom did not produce knowledge by starting from nothing. It took what existed and refined it into something that did not exist before. Hikma works the same way. The strongest models in the world are open. We take them and teach them what they have never encountered: local conditions, the data of a specific domain, the patterns of environments no global training has ever seen.

What we start with

The strongest open foundations available.

The open frontier advances every month. We begin with the strongest available foundation for each domain. The starting point is public. What it becomes is not.

What we teach it

Your data. Conditions no global training has seen.

Each foundation learns the data of the domain and environment it will serve. Local conditions. Local patterns. The record no competitor can collect at any speed.

What you own

Runs on your hardware. Belongs to no one else.

Refined intelligence deploys on hardware the organization owns, behind its own walls, offline if required. Sovereign from the moment it leaves Hikma. Proprietary from the first inference.

How HIKMA transforms intelligence
What enters
Open foundations.
Available to everyone.
The strongest models in the world are public. That is where we begin. Where everyone begins.
حكمةHIKMA
What leaves
Proprietary intelligence.
Trained on your world alone.
Intelligence that has learned your data, your conditions, your patterns. Sovereign. Offline. It belongs to you.
